task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the traceability or reports section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is in the section for reports, traceability, or land parcels (e.g., looking for 'Traçabilité', 'Fiche Parcellaire', or 'Rapports').

task_completion.description: Configure the report for the zone 'Les Groies' and current campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent has inputted or selected 'Les Groies' as the cultivable zone and selected the current campaign in the report generation form or search filter.
The generated traceability report (Fiche de traçabilité / Fiche Parcellaire) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Export and save the report as a PDF to the Downloads directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, download confirmation, terminal, or file manager shows the file being saved as or existing as 'fiche_tracabilite.pdf' in the 'Downloads' (or '/home/ga/Downloads') directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web interface to generate the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation and export should happen via the Ekylibre browser interface, not by running a script or terminal command to mock the output.

integrity.description: The PDF export was triggered from the application's native functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a download, export, or print-to-PDF button within Ekylibre or the browser, rather than creating a fake PDF file manually.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors or word processors (like LibreOffice Writer) open with manually typed traceability information.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The software used is Ekylibre, an open-source Farm Management Information System. The farm dataset is GAEC JOULIN. The report type is 'Fiche de traçabilité' (traceability record/sheet), which typically contains keywords like 'Traçabilité' and 'Intervention'. The target download directory is /home/ga/Downloads.
